recommendations.title: Friends with Benefits
recommendations.overview: Dylan is done with relationships. Jamie decides to stop buying into the Hollywood clichés of true love. When the two become friends they decide to try something new and take advantage of their mutual attraction - but without any emotional attachment.

recommendations.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
recommendations.overview: Peter Rabbit runs away from his human family when he learns they are going to portray him in a bad light in their book. Soon, he crosses paths with an older rabbit who ropes him into a heist.

recommendations.title: Anyone But You
recommendations.overview: After an amazing first date, Bea and Ben’s fiery attraction turns ice cold — until they find themselves unexpectedly reunited at a destination wedding in Australia. So they do what any two mature adults would do: pretend to be a couple.

recommendations.title: Peter Rabbit
recommendations.overview: Peter Rabbit's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

recommendations.title: Easy A
recommendations.overview: Olive, an average high school student, sees her below-the-radar existence turn around overnight once she decides to use the school's gossip grapevine to advance her social standing. Now her classmates are turning against her and the school board is b

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: Annie
recommendations.overview: Annie is a young, happy foster kid who's also tough enough to make her way on the streets of New York in 2014. Originally left by her parents as a baby with the promise that they'd be back for her someday, it's been a hard knock life ever since with

recommendations.title: #1 Cheerleader Camp
recommendations.overview: A pair of horny college guys get summer jobs at a sexy cheerleader camp.

recommendations.title: Love Don't Co$t a Thing
recommendations.overview: A high school outcast pays a cheerleader to pose as his girlfriend so he can be considered cool.

recommendations.title: Bottoms
recommendations.overview: Unpopular best friends PJ and Josie start a high school self-defense club to meet girls and lose their virginity. They soon find themselves in over their heads when the most popular students start beating each other up in the name of self-defense.
